feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BW/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP BW/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to display custom Message in RSRT and AO until valid input is given
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have implemented BADI for customer exit variables - calling external program to implement form - endform. I need to display a Message in RSRT and AO [Analysis for Office] until valid currency type value is given as input. It should allow to enter correct currency type value if wrong input is provided

In the called external called program in Form - endform - under i_step =3 , i have implemented the following code to display message. But I need to display my own custom message.

TRY.
IF lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_rs_error_with_message
* MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '655' WITH 'Enter Currency Type --> 30 '.
exporting
msgid = 'BRAIN'
msgno = '642'
msgty = sy-msgty
attribute_msgv1 = 'Currency Type.'.
ENDIF. " lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
CATCH cx_rs_error_with_message.
MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '642' WITH ' Currency Type.'.
ENDTRY.

Please suggest me , is there any class available to display message (in both RSRT and AO) until valid currency type value is provided.

Thanks
kv

entry.title: Extracting S/4HANA ACDOCA into different BW/4HANA Models (AP, AR; AA; PCA, CCA)
entry.content:
Hi,

we are in the migration to of SAP ECC to S/4HANA (Rise) and are facing challenges specifically in FICO Area.

We are investigating extraction from ACDOCA using ACDOCA based extractors e.g. 0FI_ACDOCA_10 but we don't know how to identify the records to tie them to our existing data models in BW/4HANA (e.g. we have modles for AP, AR, CCA , PCA ) based on extractors like 0FI_AP_4, 0FI_AR_4, 0EC_PCA_3, 0CO_OM_CCA_1 and others,...). For CO-PA we currently use 0FI_ACDOCA_10 and filter on object type = EO (market segment) and validate the data but in generel we do not exactly know how to identify the records and feed our existing data models per module in BW/4.

How can we detect which data belongs to each module? Is there a field  (like item category or object type) that can be used to spot which data belongs where? 

We could not find any meaningful BW/4 S/4 related business content either.

Regards,

Andreas Fuchs

entry.title: BW to BW/4HANA Sizing
entry.content:
Hi All - we are running SAP BW (NW 7.5 SPS27) system. The current Production database system size is 8.5 TB. We are planning to migrate on BW4HANA system, and we ran BW4HANA sizing report. We came to know there is no much significant database reduction in sizing report as the required database size is 8.2 TB for HANA DB. Is there any thumb rule when you migrate BW database which will be reduce by 30% on HANA DB? Pls confirm on this. 

Regards,

Charanjit

entry.title: Extractors / CDS-Views for Capex Investment, Cash Flow, and Opex Reports in SAP BW/4HANA
entry.content:
Good day Experts,
I have a requirement to build Capex Investment, Cash Flow, and Opex reports in SAP BW/4HANA using Extractors/CDS Views.
Could you please assist in identifying the necessary extractors to develop these reports?
Any documentation you can share would be greatly appreciated.
Looking forward to your support.
Best regards,

entry.title: User authorization is not working in BEX Query
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are using an authorization object to execute the query, which should restrict data visibility to a specific company code. However, it is currently displaying data for all company codes.

Could you please check and assist in resolving this issue,

entry.title: How to import currency conversion data from SAP BW/4 to SAC?
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I am trying to import the currency conversion data from SAP BW/4 to SAC currency conversion table.

I came across the documentation bellow and followed the steps until step 7 where I got a blocker.

Import Currency Conversion Data | SAP Help Portal

  • First I have created the conversion table in SAC
  • After I have chosen the option to Import Data from Data Source

  • Selected the data source SAP BW (including BW/4HANA)

 

  • Next I have selected the Target Currency Conversion Table, the Connection and "Create a new query" option

  • Although on the following step, the "Next" button is blurred which makes me think something is missing, but I am not sure what exactly

 

Can someone please advise if something was missed?

Or is there a better practice to import currency conversion data from SAP BW/4 to SAC currency conversion table?

 

Many thanks in advance!

AA

entry.title: CKM3N actual value does not match with Cost component level
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are facing some cases like a packing material issue; CKM3N"s actual value does not match the cost component level.

When we open the CKM3N, the actual value is 95,874.80 SAR, but when we analyze the details, the cost component level system indicates 95,804.88 SAR. The overall difference is 69.92 SAR. What is the problem in the system? Please explain the difference in detail, as well as the system"s behavior if the same.

Regards,

Pranita

entry.title: A Condition in BW Query (BW/4HANA)
entry.content:
A Condition placed in BW Query (BW/4HANA) works fine in Tcode-RSRT(ABAP_BICS) option, but doesn't work well in Tcode-RSRT(Aanlysis for office) option or while running the query directly in AFO.

Any reason for this ambiguous behavior?

Helpful suggestions will be appreciated.

Thank You.

entry.title: Authorization problem BW Composite provider
entry.content:
Hello, 
I have an issue with a new authorization role I created in a SAP BW/4HANA system. 

The test user is able to view aDSOs and create Queries on Composites, but she is not able to view the Composite in Eclipse. With my user, in the same eclipse installation I see everything alright (I created two projects within my installation for the two users to ensure that it's not the eclipse version's fault). 

My view:

User's view (empty folder):

The authorization is set similar to the aDSO authorization which works fine (the Composite one is even less restrictive):

aDSO restriction:

Does anyone have any hint for me in how to fix this interesting problem? 

Thank you very much! 

Br, Nina

entry.title: Duplicate values in inventory ADSO with non-cumulatives
entry.content:
Hi, guys!

I have an ADSO inventory enabled with non-cumulative ratios; let's call this ADSO A. I copied data from ADSO A to another ADSO (let's call this ADSO B), also inventory enabled with non-cumulative ratios.

Both ADSO have a navigational attribute category that comes from infoobjets 0MATERIAL, and I'm using a Full DTP with a filter in this navigational attribute (0MATERIAL-CATEGORY = 9602). Data load was successful, but not so the values; they are doubling.

For example, in the original ADSO, I have plant R34 with a stock value of $345.89, and in the target ADSO, I have plant R34 with a stock value of $691.78.

The relationship of fields in the transformation is one-to-one, and there is not any ABAP routine.

Any clues? Regards. Oscar

entry.title: Microsoft Project integratuion with BW/4HANA or SAC
entry.content:
Hello.

We want to know if It's possible to integrate Microsoft Project with our current BW/4HANA (2.0 SP07) or our SAC (client 2025.1.12 and server 2025.1.10).

Regards.

Marcelo Mazieiro.

entry.title: S/4HANA, Display Line Items in General Ledger, export larger files than what Excel can handle.
entry.content:
Hi,

"Just wondering if there is a way to download larger files than Excel can handle from Display Line items in General Ledger as one unit? I do not get the option to export in any other format.

Thank you.

entry.title: odp_prefetch/error 000001 '00010101' is not a valid value for D(8,0).
entry.content:
@BW4HANA @DTP @delta 

HI Experts, 

AM having the issue with ADRC delta extraction, Previously i have extracted through Generic extraction form S/4 system to BW4HANA. Now i have created CDS view with delta capture when am exciting the DTP am getting below error, Please any help me out to resolve this Issue.

odp_prefetch/error 000001
An exception with the type CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DATA_ERROR was raised, but was not handled locally or declared in a RAISING clause.
'00010101' is not a valid value for D(8,0).
Error in substep
'00010101' is not a valid value for D(8,0).
Request processing terminated#business

entry.title: DTIS Table not getting updated
entry.content:
We recently transported the 0FI_GL_14 extractor with a few modifications, which resulted in the associated transformations becoming inactive.

The transport error message is as follows:
DTIS table "/BIC/BD000000061" cannot be updated. Possibly due to an incompatible change.
Object reference: 0CXHLJX9AN7J5LNMPCVVAOQP21J8CJ58

We attempted a cleanup using transaction RSDTIS_CLEANUP, but it had minimal effect. Additionally, the transaction RSDTIS_LIST_REQUEST does not appear to be available in our system, so we are unable to repair the DTIS table using that method.

entry.title: I am new in SAP, and need to run MD02_InHouseMaterialPlannedOrde,How to do this?
S_TABU_LIN object not being checked -> failed to load data
entry.content:
Alright, so this is a weird question, because I got it to work in one BW (SAP Business Warehouse) 4/HANA system but not in another.

The task is simple and I will simplify it even further: You have an InfoObject ZTEST with two attributes which don't matter. There are two values we will load into it using master data maintenance: 00000 and 00001. One user called USER_1 is supposed to only see and maintain the value 00000 and another user should only see and maintain the value 00001 in the master data maintenance. I want to reiterate, that I already got this to work in one system but I am clueless as to why it's not working in another one.

Now we do the spicy stuff, we use this little thing here:

The master data maintenance with authorization check. Now because I analyzed this thing for quite some time now, I know what it does. The user that logs into the cockpit is now checked against S_TABU_NAM and S_TABU_LIN. In my old system, you were also checked against S_RS_IOMAD but in the new one, you're instead checked against S_TABU_DIS for some reason, but you're not anymore if you have S_TABU_NAM already. So S_TABU_NAM gives you access to the table and suddenly it asks for S_TABU_CLI too which is fine, it wants you to be able to maintain cross-client tables, okay. Now the interesting bit is S_TABU_LIN.

When we activated the authorization check, it automatically created an activated a corresponding organization criterion that it will check against to see if you have access to the individual rows. It also only checks for 02 - Change. Now, if I put in "*" as the value in my custom role for the authorization object S_TABU_LIN, it will work fine. My test user can see all rows. If you remove S_TABU_LIN, it will say "no data" and in the authorization trace, you can see that it checked for the existence of S_TABU_LIN and didn't find it.

Everything as expected until now. If I put in 00000 as the only value in the authorization object, it doesn't display anything and instead shows "failed to load data". Looking at the trace we see... nothing. It checks for the existence of S_TABU_LIN but no further checks. In fact, the test user passes all checks the system gives it but they still don't see any data. Again, in my old system this simply worked, the test user say one line with 00000 and the other row was simply not displayed.

What can cause this? How can I get this to work? The task seems easy and standard enough to be common, but I find no information on anyone even knowing what "master data maintenance with authorization checks" actually does.

Thanks for any hint or trace on how to resolve this issue.

entry.title: SAP BDC Free Trial Version
entry.content: Would like to know around when SAP BDC Trial Version will be available ?

entry.title: Purging data in SAP BW4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

1. Can we directly delete the data from cold tier by using DELETED option in RSOADSODTO and to clear physically data , clean up option in cockpit view.

2. how to  purge the data in ADSO which doesnot have time char ( TD) as part of compliance.

Request you to share your expertise .

entry.title: Data Purging Process in BW4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to purge the data in all adso's with retention period of 15 yrs.

For ADSO with time char, came across below option to design a solution for purging the data.

Option:

  1. Create a config table with ADSO names, Time char and org units. Creating an org table to maintain its values( If available, Cocode, Plant)
  2. Write an ABAP or AMDP program considering the above two tables data and system date for  deriving  period.
  3. Maintaining a log table to track deletion of ADSO data.
  4. Calling the program in Process chain to execute as a yearly activity.

Note: Stored procedure option is not preferred in our case as all jobs are scheduled in Process chains.

Could you please assist or help if above option is ok or is there any other better option available for better and efficient way. we have around 200 ADSOs to purge now.

Thanks,

Shyamala.

entry.title: An error message occurs in the CDS View related to OLAP statistics.
entry.content:
An error message occurs in the CDS View related to OLAP statistics.

CDS DDL -: RV_I_INFOPROV  InfoProvider

Message :

  • Duplicate association OBJECTMODEL.FOREIGNKEY.ASSOCIATION value "_OWNER" found in CDS views RV_I_INFOPROV and RV_I_ADSO [Analytics]
  • Duplicate association OBJECTMODEL.FOREIGNKEY.ASSOCIATION value "_LASTCHANGEDBY" found in CDS views RV_I_INFOPROV and RV_I_ADSO [Analytics]

  •
